title: Senior Software Engineer - iGate India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - iGate India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at iGate India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About iGate India:
iGate India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India!
